ddls:
CREATE TABLE "census_data" (
  "geoid" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each geographic region */,
  "geodisplaylabel" TEXT /* Display label for the geographic region */,
  "pop_id" INTEGER /* Population ID */,
  "est_tot_pop" INTEGER /* Estimated total population */,
  "checking_tot_pop" INTEGER /* Total population (checking) */,
  "est_lep" INTEGER /* Estimated limited English proficiency (LEP) population */,
  "checking_lep" INTEGER /* Limited English proficiency (LEP) population (checking) */,
  "est_other_lang" INTEGER /* Estimated population speaking other languages */,
  "checking_other_lang" INTEGER /* Population speaking other languages (checking) */,
  "pct_lep" REAL /* Percentage of LEP population */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the census data */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of the population (e.g., 0-17, 18-34, 35-54, 55+) */,
  "race_ethnicity" TEXT /* Race and ethnicity of the population */,
  "median_income" INTEGER /* Median income of the population */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Highest level of education attained by the population */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("geoid", "pop_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "geographic_regions" (
  "geoid" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each geographic region */,
  "geodisplaylabel" TEXT /* Display label for the geographic region */,
  "region_type" TEXT /* Type of geographic region (e.g., state, county) */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the geographic region */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the geographic region */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density of the geographic region */,
  "area_sq_km" REAL /* Area of the geographic region in square kilometers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("geoid")
)

CREATE TABLE "population_estimates" (
  "pop_id" INTEGER /* Population ID */,
  "geoid" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the geographic region */,
  "est_tot_pop" INTEGER /* Estimated total population */,
  "est_lep" INTEGER /* Estimated limited English proficiency (LEP) population */,
  "est_other_lang" INTEGER /* Estimated population speaking other languages */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the population estimate */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of the population (e.g., 0-17, 18-34, 35-54, 55+) */,
  "race_ethnicity" TEXT /* Race and ethnicity of the population */,
  "median_income" INTEGER /* Median income of the population */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Highest level of education attained by the population */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pop_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_estimates_geoid FOREIGN KEY ("geoid") REFERENCES geographic_regions ("geoid")
)

CREATE TABLE "languages" (
  "lang_id" INTEGER /* Language ID */,
  "geoid" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the geographic region */,
  "lang_name" TEXT /* Name of the language */,
  "est_population" INTEGER /* Estimated population speaking the language */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the language data */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of the population (e.g., 0-17, 18-34, 35-54, 55+) */,
  "race_ethnicity" TEXT /* Race and ethnicity of the population */,
  "language_proficiency" TEXT /* Level of proficiency in the language (e.g., fluent, intermediate, basic) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lang_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_languages_geoid FOREIGN KEY ("geoid") REFERENCES geographic_regions ("geoid")
)

CREATE TABLE "language_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Statistic ID */,
  "geoid" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the geographic region */,
  "lep_population" INTEGER /* Limited English proficiency (LEP) population */,
  "other_lang_population" INTEGER /* Population speaking other languages */,
  "pct_lep" REAL /* Percentage of LEP population */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the language statistics */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of the population (e.g., 0-17, 18-34, 35-54, 55+) */,
  "race_ethnicity" TEXT /* Race and ethnicity of the population */,
  "median_income" INTEGER /* Median income of the population */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Highest level of education attained by the population */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_language_statistics_geoid FOREIGN KEY ("geoid") REFERENCES geographic_regions ("geoid")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User ID */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role (e.g., researcher, analyst, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Project ID */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User ID */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Project name */,
  "description" TEXT /* Project description */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the project was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the project (e.g., active, archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visualizations" (
  "viz_id" INTEGER /* Visualization ID */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Project ID */,
  "viz_type" TEXT /* Type of visualization (e.g., map, chart) */,
  "viz_data" TEXT /* Visualization data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the visualization was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the visualization (e.g., draft, published) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("viz_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visualizations_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Log ID */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User ID */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser or device */,
  "accessed_object" TEXT /* Object (e.g., dataset, visualization) that was accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "perm_id" INTEGER /* Permission ID */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User ID */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Project ID */,
  "permission_level" TEXT /* Permission level (e.g., read, write) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("perm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
